title: My Generation
why_this_song: My Generation by The Who (1965) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 45 times; first heard in: "People try to put us d-down (talkin' 'bout my generation)"
Appears 27 times; first heard in: "People try to put us d-down (talkin' 'bout my generation)"
Appears 26 times; first heard in: "People try to put us d-down (talkin' 'bout my generation)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "This is my generation, baby"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Why don't you all f-fade away (talkin' 'bout my generation)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Why don't you all f-fade away (talkin' 'bout my generation)
And don't try dig what we all s-s-say (talkin' 'bout my generation)
I'm not trying to cause a big s-s-sensation (talkin' 'bout my generation)
Talkin' 'bout my generation (this is my generation, baby)
Talkin' 'bout my generation (this is my generation)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "generation" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "generation" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "talkin'" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Who one question about "My Generation", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Who sobre "My Generation", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "My Generation" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "My Generation" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "My Generation" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "My Generation" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
